color_constants.description: All dark mode colors centralized in cores.ts with consistent pattern: light + dark variants
existing_constants: CORES_VIOLACAO — { HARD: { border, bg, text, textLight }, SOFT: { border, bg, text, textLight } }
CORES_GENERO — { F, M } (already includes dark variants)
CORES_EXCECAO — { FERIAS, ATESTADO, BLOQUEIO } (already includes dark variants)
color_constants.pattern: Each uses: 'bg-color-100 dark:bg-color-950/30 text-color-700 dark:text-color-300 border-color-200 dark:border-color-800'

component_patterns.description: Standard patterns for pages, components, and hooks
component_patterns.page_structure: useState + useApiData for loading + PageHeader + Card-based layout + toast for feedback
component_patterns.useApiData: Reusable hook: useApiData<T>(fetcher, deps) → { data, loading, error, reload }
component_patterns.dialog_pattern: Dialog/AlertDialog from shadcn + useState for open/close + toast on success/error
component_patterns.badge_pattern: Badges use variant='outline' with className from cores.ts constants

RF1.2_EscalaPagina_indicators.issue: 5 circles use hardcoded bg-X-100, bg-red-100, bg-amber-100 without dark
RF1.2_EscalaPagina_indicators.icons: text-emerald-600, text-red-600, text-amber-600 need dark: variants

RF1.3_ColaboradorLista.issue: Avatar: inline 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-700' / 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700' missing dark
RF1.3_ColaboradorLista.fix: Replace with CORES_GENERO[colab.sexo] which already has dark
RF1.3_ColaboradorLista.preference_badge: Lines 226-229 use 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700' without dark

RF1.4_ColaboradorDetalhe.function: ExcecaoIcon returns inline colors for FERIAS/ATESTADO/BLOQUEIO
RF1.4_ColaboradorDetalhe.fix: Use CORES_EXCECAO[tipo] which already has dark variants

RF1.5_Dashboard.issue: Badge alertas: 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700' without dark
RF1.5_Dashboard.fix: add dark variants or use constant from cores.ts

violations_current_implementation.current_display: Flat list of violations with technical rule names (v.regra)
violations_current_implementation.issue: Shows technical rule codes instead of human-friendly text. Need to:
required_changes: Map rule names to Portuguese descriptions (10 rules total)
Group violations by COLABORADOR not by regra
Add visual cards per person with list of problems
Add action hint for HARD violations
Mark cells with ring-2 ring-destructive for HARD violations

setor_detalle_button_duplication.problem: BLOCKER UX — 3 buttons lead to same destination:
setor_detalle_button_duplication.fix: Replace with single conditional: if (escalaAtual) show 'Abrir Escala' else show 'Gerar Escala'

contrato_lista_current_state.current: Read-only list of templates showing name + 4 metrics in card grid
missing_features: Empty state says 'Rode o seed' (UX-A2 blocker)
contrato_lista_current_state.structure: Cards with FileText icon, name, 4 metric badges

rule_mapping_required.description: 10 rule names from motor must map to Portuguese text

HARD: MAX_DIAS_CONSECUTIVOS → 'Trabalhou mais de 6 dias seguidos sem folga'
DESCANSO_ENTRE_JORNADAS → 'Intervalo entre jornadas menor que 11 horas'
ESTAGIARIO_DOMINGO → 'Estagiario nao pode trabalhar no domingo'
CONTRATO_MAX_DIA → 'Jornada diaria excede o limite do contrato'
MAX_JORNADA_DIARIA → 'Jornada diaria excede o limite de 10 horas (CLT)'
SOFT: META_SEMANAL → 'Horas semanais fora da meta do contrato'
PREFERENCIA_DIA → 'Escalado no dia que pediu pra evitar'
PREFERENCIA_TURNO → 'Escalado em turno diferente do preferido'
COBERTURA → 'Faixa horaria com menos pessoas que o necessario'

tiposContratoService.note: All handlers already exist in IPC, no new backend work needed

useApiData.signature: useApiData<T>(fetcher, deps) → { data, loading, error, reload }
useApiData.note: Ready to use for ContratoLista data fetching

missing: switch (NOT INSTALLED — required for RF5.2 trabalha_domingo toggle)

TipoContrato.fields: id, nome, horas_semanais, dias_trabalho, trabalha_domingo, max_minutos_dia

Violacao.fields: severidade (HARD|SOFT), regra (string), colaborador_id, colaborador_nome, mensagem, data (optional)

internal: src/shared/constants.ts (SEVERIDADES, DIAS_SEMANA, TURNOS — may extend for rule names)
shadcn_components: Alert (for RFC5.3 disclaimer — needs verification if available)
potential_new_installs: switch component from shadcn/ui (for RF5.2 trabalha_domingo field in ContratoLista dialog)

key_findings.finding_1: ThemeSwitcher.tsx (51 lines) is DEAD CODE — never imported. Safe to delete. Grep confirms it's only in PRD and implementation_plan.json
key_findings.finding_2: CORES_GENERO, CORES_EXCECAO, CORES_VIOLACAO already exist in cores.ts with dark variants. Many files just need to USE them instead of hardcoding colors.
key_findings.finding_3: SetorDetalhe button blocker is straightforward: replace 3 buttons (lines 536-551) with single conditional logic
key_findings.finding_4: ContratoLista is read-only placeholder. Needs full CRUD: Dialog for edit/create, AlertDialog for delete with validation
key_findings.finding_5: Rule mapping (10 strings) is missing. Must create in formatadores.ts or new constants file and reuse in mapError() and violation display
key_findings.finding_6: Violations display needs complete redesign: current is flat list of technical terms, needs grouped cards by COLABORADOR with human text, action hints, and grid highlighting
key_findings.finding_7: mapError() in formatadores.ts is 50% complete. Already handles some cases but needs 4-5 more scenarios (no colabs, no demandas, timeout, generic)
key_findings.finding_8: Alert component from shadcn may not be installed — verify before using for RF5.3 disclaimer. If not available, use Card + Info icon as fallback
key_findings.finding_9: Switch component from shadcn NOT INSTALLED — needed for RF5.2 trabalha_domingo toggle. Either install or use Checkbox as fallback
key_findings.finding_10: Dark mode gaps are NOT systemic — just scattered hardcoded colors in 5 files. Pattern already established, just need copy-paste application

risk_1_switch_component.description: Switch component not installed for trabalha_domingo toggle in ContratoLista dialog
risk_1_switch_component.mitigation: Use Checkbox as fallback or install switch component. Check dependencies in package.json

risk_2_violations_visual.description: Grouping violations by COLABORADOR and adding grid highlighting (ring-2 ring-destructive) requires mapping violacoes → Set<'colaboradorId-data'>. Must be correct or grid won't highlight properly.

risk_3_alert_component.description: Alert component from shadcn may not exist. If needed for RFC5.3 disclaimer, fallback to Card + custom styling
risk_3_alert_component.mitigation: Check if @/components/ui/alert exists before using. If not, use Card with border-l-4 and info icon

risk_4_contrato_lista_delete.description: IPC deletar handler has safety check for colabs vinculados, but error message format unknown. May need custom parsing.
risk_4_contrato_lista_delete.mitigation: Test delete flow manually. If error message format unclear, add try/catch with generic fallback in mapError()

risk_5_rule_mapping_maintenance.description: 10 rule names hardcoded in mapping. If motor adds new rules (orchestrate 007+), must update frontend mapping.
risk_5_rule_mapping_maintenance.mitigation: Document rule mapping as constant, add comment linking to motor constraints in backend

risk_6_dark_mode_varredura.description: May miss hardcoded colors. Grep for 'bg-', 'text-' without 'dark:' may reveal more gaps.
risk_6_dark_mode_varredura.mitigation: Final step: Run grep to find any remaining colors missing dark variants in renderer/src/

phase_1_text_infrastructure: 1.1: Create rule → text mapping (10 entries) in formatadores.ts or new constants file
1.3: Export rule mapping as constant for reuse in violations display
phase_2_dark_mode: 2.1: PontuacaoBadge.tsx — add dark: variants to 3 colors
2.2: EscalaPagina.tsx — indicator cards dark (5 cards), icon dark (1 icon)
2.3: ColaboradorLista.tsx — replace inline avatar colors with CORES_GENERO, badge dark
2.4: ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx — replace ExcecaoIcon inline colors with CORES_EXCECAO
2.6: Delete ThemeSwitcher.tsx and verify grep returns 0
phase_3_blockers_ux: 3.2: EscalaPagina.tsx — violacoes display: group by colaborador, add human text, add hints, add grid highlighting
3.3: ContratoLista.tsx — CRUD: Dialog edit/create with 5 fields, AlertDialog delete, disclaimer Alert, empty state
phase_4_verification: 4.3: Dark mode varredura: grep for colors without dark:

notes.critical: Users are Marco's parents (non-technical). If they see 'MAX_DIAS_CONSECUTIVOS' or 'Rode o seed', they'll call Marco. ZERO technical terms must surface.
notes.pattern_reference: StatusBadge.tsx is perfect example of correct pattern: uses constant from cores.ts, applies className directly
notes.theme_switching: Dark mode already works (next-themes installed and configured). Just need to add 'dark:' variants to unsafe colors.
notes.ipc_note: All backend IPC handlers for tiposContrato already exist — NO backend changes needed for RF5 ContratoLista
notes.empty_state: Current ContratoLista empty state says 'Rode o seed' (UX-A2). New state: 'Nenhum tipo de contrato cadastrado. Crie um template para comecar.'

patterns.summary: Frontend blockers are mostly cosmetic (dark mode) and UX (text/grouping). No complex logic. Main work: (1) Add rule→text mapping, (2) Apply dark variants to 8 color instances, (3) Unify 3 buttons to 1, (4) Rewrite violations display to group by person + human text, (5) Build ContratoLista CRUD. Risk is low-medium (violations grouping needs careful Set logic, switch component verification). Budget: medium (10 files, straightforward pattern application, but ContratoLista dialog needs care).
